commands: vp lint --threads=1 src/nuxt.spec.ts src/unit.spec.ts # all upstream Vitest imports are exempt; the unrelated Vite import still fails

vp lint --threads=1 src/nuxt.spec.ts src/unit.spec.ts # confirm the package-level compatible result is clean
